query: Could you design a 7-day travel plan starting March 11th and ending March 17th, 2022, for a group of 7 people? We intend to start from Rapid City and travel to 3 cities in Colorado. Our budget is about $16,300. For accommodations, we prefer having entire rooms.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Rapid City to Colorado Springs, duration: 6 hours 59 mins, distance: 735 km, cost: 36
plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs

plan.breakfast: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.attraction: The Broadmoor Seven Falls;Garden of the Gods;Manitou Cliff Dwellings;

plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs
